title: タフでビッグでとってもボーノ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's been a while since Hishi Akebono scouted me as her trainer. Today, we're spending a little time together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yup, yup, these look juuust right! I bet they're super—Ah, but I
shouldn't pick too many from the same spot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let's run over to the next mountain to forage some more! Come on,
Trainer! Hurry, hurry! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days earlier...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hey Trainer, are you free this weekend? I want to make a hot pot sumo wrestlers eat called chanko, and I need ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I've always wanted to gather ingredients together with my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At most, I figured we would go to her favorite fish and vegetable
stalls, but that notion was quickly dashed when we headed into the
mountains to collect mushrooms.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, that should do it. Next stop is the sea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our basket is overflowing with mushrooms after traversing five whole
mountains. I try to lift it up, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! With all those mushrooms, it's gonna be real heavy! Just leave
that basket to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Up we go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She lifts the basket as if it were nothing and slips her arms into the
backpack straps. With the basket securely resting against her back,
she walks off with a smile.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: DRAAAUGH!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Look at the size of this sea bass! Trainer, can you keep watch over the
cooler? There's a lot of hungry kitty cats in the area.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ah, I spy an even bigger fish! Come here!

text_block_list.name: Local A
text_block_list.text: Uh... Sorry, did that girl just catch a fish with her bare hands?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yahoo! Look at this huge fish!

text_block_list.name: Local B
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, you must be seeing thi—huh? Wait, you're right... But,
like, literally how?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Catching people's attention everywhere we go, we continue to gather
ingredients. Seeing our haul and feeling my body aching, I start to
suggest we head back, when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All right, next stop is the butcher!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yup! There's this butcher I like that sells the most scrumptious ground
chicken. We can't have our hot pot without that!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It's a tad far from here, but the view on the way is totally worth it! Come on, let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her run off, her imposing silhouette getting smaller and
smaller. We've probably walked several dozen kilometers today, yet
she shows no signs of fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After over an hour on the train, we finally arrive in a deceptively
peaceful small rural town. If only I knew of the disaster to come!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Mmm! That country air smells so good! W-wait, is that a boar?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oink! Oink!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Awww, it is! What a cute little piggy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, why is it getting closer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Stomp, stomp, stomp, stomp!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Eep! Wh-wh-whoa! Trainer, run away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Terrified, it takes me a few too many seconds to react. As I turn to
run, I lose my balance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And fall into the nearby river, along with our hard-earned hot pot
ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Are you okay, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, I'm not hurt, but all the mushrooms and fish Hishi
Akebono worked so hard to get are floating away...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm more worried about you than some silly food. Besides, we can
just buy extra meat instead! No worries! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, when we get to the butcher...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh?! They're closed?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, as if to rub salt in our wounds...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: We missed the last bus?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's so early! Did they change the timetable? I swear there was a
different one when we got off... I'm sorry, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... the first bus arrives at six o'clock in the morning, so that
meeeans... we have twelve hours?! For real?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hoping to avoid camping out, I contact the academy and try to find
us accommodations, but to no avail...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So we're camping, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all that work collecting ingredients, we end up stuck in the
countryside for the night... Hishi Akebono may be tough, but she must
be pretty shake—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh well, these things happen! Ah, look here! I've got some canned
food and rice, so why don't I make us some mixed rice? ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's not every day that we can go camping. Might as well enjoy
ourselves. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow! Look at the sky, Trainer! The stars are so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her smile doesn't betray a hint of fatigue or disappointment. There's
even a bit of a skip in her step as she trots off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I turn my eyes up, though, I realize she was right—the stars are
especially beautiful out here.
